description: Evaluate thermal protection requirements for a chemical shipment by retrieving the Melting Point and Boiling Point for six chemicals from CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Determine the transport action based on the following logic: if Melting Point > 41°F, assign 'HEAT'; if Boiling Point < 95°F, assign 'COOL'; otherwise, assign 'STANDARD'. The chemicals to assess are: Acetic Acid (CAS 64-19-7), Acetaldehyde (CAS 75-07-0), Benzene (CAS 71-43-2), Isoprene (CAS 78-79-5), Ethanol (CAS 64-17-5), and p-Xylene (CAS 106-42-3). Export the findings to '~/Desktop/shipping_manifest.csv' with columns: 'Chemical', 'Melting Point (F)', 'Boiling Point (F)', and 'Action'.
